records.text: Official CDC operational public-health guidance relevant to Aedes aegypti. Topic: integrated mosquito management, Aedes aegypti, dengue, Zika, chikungunya, yellow fever, vector control, surveillance, source reduction. Summary: Guidance for vector control programs working on Aedes aegypti, dengue, and Zika.. Page excerpt: Integrated mosquito management Integrated mosquito management Aedes aegypti mosquitoes can transmit dengue, Zika, chikungunya, and yellow fever. Vector control programs use surveillance, source reduction, larvicides, adulticides, and community action.
records.title: CDC guidance: Integrated mosquito management
